info.shortName: FT Vest Gold Strategy Target In
info.longName: FT Vest Gold Strategy Target Income ETF

funds_data.description: The fund invests in a portfolio substantially composed of short-term U.S. Treasury securities, cash and cash equivalents, and in the shares of a wholly-owned subsidiary (the “Subsidiary”) that holds FLexible Exchange Options (“FLEX Options”) that reference the price performance of the underlying ETF. It is non-diversified.
